By knowing or obtaining a resource's unique identifier (UUID) belonging to another Resource Server within the same realm, an authenticated client could bypass authorization checks. This allows the client to perform unauthorized GET, PUT, and DELETE operations on resources, leading to information disclosure and potential unauthorized modification or deletion of data.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00303, "percentile": 0.21836}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c739-f6xw-6pv2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-30T19:16:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c739-f6xw-6pv2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c739-f6xw-6pv2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-4630"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-19T12:16:19Z", "published_at": "2026-05-19T12:31:41Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4630", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-4630", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2450245", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/issues/49115", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/pull/49121", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/commit/0cea089bd19f5061f5fd47099fd6fb41a17d8c55", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/commit/1192267af8f16a7b722bdc2abbd3410c477388aa", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/commit/4e9b17cbedb828b4afc6b62399eee317d4735234", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:19596", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:19597", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c739-f6xw-6pv2"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak", "summary": "Keycloak Protection API allows authenticated clients to access and modify resources owned by other Resource Servers", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T19:16:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c739-f6xw-6pv2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "26.6.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.keycloak:keycloak-services"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 26.6.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Keycloak Protection API allows authenticated clients to access and modify resources owned by other Resource Servers
